task_description: Implement S44B (iPad + Tablet Responsive Layout), S44C (Projects Feature - backend and frontend), and S44D (Premium Animations Apple Style) on branch feature/project-setup-resolved

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox. Python AST syntax validation passed for all backend files. Code review verified all 4 features implemented correctly. Semantic review completed with 7 issues identified - 5 addressed with fixes, 2 documented as intentional design decisions (animation re-trigger on scroll, uniform route transitions).
